Press Release  |  For Immediate Release
Rip It Labs Raises $X Seed Round to Build the World's Largest AI Agent Corporation
RILBOT marketplace launches with 455 specialized AI agents across 30+ industries — democratizing access to expert guidance for 33 million American small businesses
City, State  —  Month DD, 2026

Rip It Labs, the company building the world's first full-spectrum AI agent corporation, today announced it has closed a $X million seed round led by [Lead Investor Name / Fund]. The proceeds will be used to accelerate the commercial launch of RILBOT, the company's AI agent marketplace that gives any business owner instant access to a team of specialized AI experts across law, finance, healthcare, construction, real estate, and 25 other industries — all for $49 per month.

455
AI Agents
36
Expert Teams
30
Industries
$49
Per Month

RILBOT takes a fundamentally different approach to AI assistants. Rather than a single general-purpose chatbot, RILBOT deploys teams of domain-scoped specialists — a Corporate Attorney, Contract Specialist, Compliance Officer, Litigation Advisor, and IP Counsel working in parallel — that analyze a user's query simultaneously and synthesize their findings into a structured action plan. The result is expert-grade guidance that previously required retaining multiple professionals at hundreds of dollars per hour, now available to any small business owner in under 60 seconds.

"We didn't build a chatbot. We built a corporation — with every department. Legal, healthcare, finance, construction, hotel management, real estate. Four hundred and fifty-five specialists available to any entrepreneur, anywhere, for less than the price of a streaming subscription. That's what we've built, and that's what this round is going to scale."
— Tim Cavin, Founder & CEO, Rip It Labs

The platform's architecture sets it apart from general-purpose AI tools. Each RILBOT agent is scoped to a specific domain with institutional knowledge, guardrails, and professional context built in. When a user submits a query to a team, five to seven specialists process it in parallel before a synthesis layer generates a unified Executive Summary and Action Plan. The platform also includes a no-code agent builder, allowing businesses to create custom AI specialists for their specific needs, and a developer API that enables third-party applications to embed RILBOT's expert teams into their own products.

"[Lead investor quote: e.g., 'Rip It Labs is building the infrastructure layer for expert AI at a moment when every small business in America is asking the same question: how do I compete with larger players who have full teams? Tim's answer — give them the team — is the right answer at the right time.']"
— [Investor Name], [Title], [Fund Name]

Alongside the RILBOT platform, Rip It Labs has developed RILCOIN — a native utility token that powers transactions within the RILBOT ecosystem. RILCOIN provides access to premium agent tiers, high-volume API usage, and enterprise features. The token is designed as a pure utility instrument: demand for RILCOIN is directly tied to platform usage, creating a flywheel between product growth and token value. A DEX listing is planned for later this year following completion of a formal utility token legal opinion.

The company is targeting the 33 million small businesses in the United States as its primary market — entrepreneurs and operators who currently lack affordable access to the legal, financial, and operational expertise that larger companies retain as full-time staff. With the seed funding, Rip It Labs plans to hire its first commercial team, complete HIPAA compliance certification for its Healthcare vertical, launch on Product Hunt, and reach $50,000 in monthly recurring revenue within 18 months of the close.

About Rip It Labs
Rip It Labs is the company behind RILBOT, the world's first full-spectrum AI agent corporation. RILBOT provides 455 specialized AI agents organized into 48 expert teams across 30 industries, giving any business owner access to instant expert guidance in law, finance, healthcare, construction, real estate, hotel management, and more — all for $49 per month. The platform includes multi-agent team routing, a no-code agent builder, a developer API, and RILCOIN, a native utility token powering ecosystem transactions. Rip It Labs is headquartered in [City, State].
